title: LexiSumm
description: An abstractive text summarization tool powered by a fine-tuned BART model. Processes long-form Bengali and English documents and surfaces key insights through a clean Next.js interface.

title: DevBoard
description: A lightweight Kanban-style project management tool built for developer teams. Features real-time collaboration via WebSockets and native GitHub issue import.

title: BDWeather CLI
description: A terminal weather companion for Bangladesh using the Bangladesh Meteorological Department's open API. Displays 7-day forecasts with ASCII art visualizations.

title: AlgoViz
description: An interactive algorithm visualizer for sorting, pathfinding, and tree traversal. Built as a learning tool for introductory data structures courses.
